title: ilex retusifolia
intro: Ilex retusifolia, also known as the Chinese holly, is a type of evergreen shrub native to China. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Ilex retusifolia include reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ilex retusifolia include tea, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and branches in hot water, and are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
